test_cases.name: Control 1-1 Strategy Assessment
test_cases.input: Review our organization's cybersecurity policy document against NCA ECC Control 1-1 (Cybersecurity Strategy).

test_cases.name: Full Domain 1 Audit
test_cases.input: Conduct a full NCA ECC Domain 1 (Cybersecurity Governance) audit for our Saudi government entity.

test_cases.name: Patch Management SLA Check
test_cases.name_ar: فحص اتفاقيات مستوى خدمة إدارة التصحيحات
test_cases.input: Check if our patch management process complies with NCA ECC Control 2-3 vulnerability management SLAs.
expected_sections: NCA ECC SLA Requirements (Critical: 72h, High: 1 week, Medium: 1 month, Low: 3 months)

test_cases.name: Cloud Security Data Residency
test_cases.input: Review our cloud service provider agreement for NCA ECC Control 4-2 compliance, specifically data residency requirements for Saudi government data.

test_cases.name: Incident Reporting Timeline
test_cases.input: What are the NCA ECC incident reporting requirements for critical cybersecurity incidents?
